CONTENT.Club career: Ntanda-Lukisa is a youth product of the Belgian clubs Anderlecht, Mechelen, and Sint-Truiden before moving to the youth academy of the Italian club Sampdoria on 27 August 2022. He made his senior and professional debut with Sampdoria as a late substitute in a 2–0 Serie A loss to Napoli on 4 June 2023.
CONTENT.International career: Born in Belgium, Ntanda-Lukisa is of Congolese descent. He is a youth international for Belgium, having played up to the Belgium U18s.

SUMMARY: Samuel Ntanda-Lukisa (born 30 June 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Italian Serie B club Sampdoria. Born in Belgium, he is a youth international for the DR Congo.
